# content-service

> QARoom content-service: posts and votes within communities. Milestone 0 reference service.

The machine-readable contract is `openapi.yaml` (OpenAPI 3.0, generated from Zod).
Live capabilities are served at `GET /system/capabilities` in MCP-tool-shaped form,
and current observable state at `GET /system/state`. Every error is RFC 7807
`application/problem+json` with `retryable`, `next_actions`, and `failure_domain`.

## Operations
- POST /api/communities/{communityId}/posts — createPost (mutating; Idempotency-Key required)
- GET  /api/communities/{communityId}/feed  — listCommunityFeed
- GET  /api/posts/{postId}                   — getPost
- POST /api/posts/{postId}/votes             — castVote (mutating; Idempotency-Key required)
- GET  /system/state                         — getSystemState
- GET  /system/capabilities                  — getSystemCapabilities

## Docs
- Contract: ./openapi.yaml
- Agent reference: ./AGENTS.md
- Repo conventions: /AGENTS.md, /docs
